titleStmt.title: SII 24.511: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 511. (A.R. No. 21 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers the gift of lands by purchase from Paramēśvara-Bhaṭṭa Ratnagirināthar of Mēlaipperuṅgāvūr alias Lekkaṇadaṇṇāyakapuram in Maḻanāḍu by Śevvandināthan, the headman of Kallūr in Maṉṟachcha-nallūr for offerings to be given during the halts of the deity at the maṇḍapa built by him at Vaḍagarai Nochchiyam tōppu on the fifth day of the teppa (floating) festival. A share of these offerings was to go to Chakkirarāyar Tirumalaiyār. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1514, Nandana, Mithuna, śu. 7, Tuesday, Uttira correspond regularly to 1592, A.D. June 6, Tuesday, ·36; the nakshatra commenced on the previous day and ended at ·02 of Wednesday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śakābdam 1000 5 100 10 4 Itaṉ mel cellā niṉṟa nan=tana samvatsarattu mithunanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣañca saptamiyum maṅgaḷavāramum peṟṟa Uttira nakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭiyakulāśanivaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti vaḷanāṭu tiruvaraṅkakan
tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar śrībhaṇṭārattukku maṉṟaccanallūr kallūrk kiḻavar cevvantinātaṉeṉ deṇḍan samarppittu poliyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi . Aṭiyeṉuṭaiya Upaiyamāṉa maṇṭapakkaṭṭaḷaikku poliyūṭṭākac cetta tiruccirāppaḷḷi
Ucāvaṭi vaṭakarai maḻanāṭu kiḻaimuṟiyil melaipperuṅkāvūrāṉa Ilakkaṇa teṇāyakkar purattu paramecurapaṭṭairaṟṟiṉaRead irattiṉakirinātar kaiyil koyil paṇ ṭārattil koṇṭu cetta nilam Aṟuveliyil kūṭi mutal yiṭṭa poṉ 100 7 10kku koṇṭu cetta nilam 1 likku rekaippaṭi poṉ 3 10kku poliyūṭṭuk kaṭṭaḷai Aṭi ye
ṉuṭaiya Upaiyamāka vaṭakarai nocciyam toppil kaṭṭiṉa maṇṭapattil teṟpaRead teppattiruṉāḷ Añcāntiruṉāḷil perumāḷ Eṟiyaruḷukiṟa tiruvantikkāppukku ney varuṣamSymbol for “uri”tirukkuttumaṇi viḷakkukku ney 2Vṭ Āka ney 2Vṭ varuṣattukku U 3 tiruvārātaṉam koṇṭaruḷukayil cāttiyaruḷum cantaṇappaṭi 3kku pu 1 Amutu ceytaruḷum poriya
mutu 3 100ttukku poṉ 3 Atirasam 2 100 kku poṉ 3 pu 6 vaṭai 2 100 kku poṉ 2pu 4 cukiyaṉ 2 100kku poṉ 2 pu4 veccamutu kūṉ 4 10kku poṉ 4 cemattaḷikai 2 kku poṉ 1 pu 6 tiruvolakkattukku cantaṇappaṭi 3 10 kku pon_ 1 pākku śva 4 10 kkum veṟṟilai 6 100kku pu 3 Iḷanīr 2 100 kku poṉ 1 campā kūṉ 4 10 kku � 8 peruntiruppāvāṭaikku kaṟiyamutu tayir teṅkāy paḻam Uḷppaṭa vakai poṉ 2 pu 3 Āka poṉ 3 10 Intap poṉ muppatukku Inta nilattil
Utayamkoṇṭe candrādityavaraiyum naṭakka kaṭavatākavum . Itukku varum viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu porikaḷattukku kuṟuṇiyum tiruppaṇiyāram taḷikai pat til Oṉṟum cakkiṟarāyar tirumalaiyaṟku kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭapaṭiyāle putrapautraparamparaiyāka peṟṟuvarakkaṭavarākavum . Ippaṭikku poliyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam Eḻutiṉamaikku koyil kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyan Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 24.511 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
